---
title: "Projects"
listing:
  contents: projects
  type: grid
  categories: true
  sort:
    - "date desc"
  fields: [image, title, description, categories]
---

I've spent the last several years building companies rather than just studying them — which means every project below comes with real revenue, real employees, and real compliance headaches attached. Below are the three ventures I've co-founded, spanning healthcare event services, consumer apparel, and B2B compliance SaaS. Each write-up covers the business problem, my role, the data/analytics systems I built, and the results.

## What You'll Find

- **Scaling operations with data:** how I used financial models and workforce analytics to help grow Prevent Medical Solutions to 580+ employees.
- **Brand & e-commerce analytics:** building the marketing and customer data foundation for a DTC apparel brand.
- **Product & GTM strategy for an early-stage SaaS startup:** how BreakPlate is using data to sell compliance software into a $2B+ liability market.

---
